heading: Establishment of softwood lumber importer declaration program
label: 1683a Establishment of softwood lumber importer declaration program
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (c)(2)(A), was in the original section “802”, and was translated as meaning the section 802 of act , as added by , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 1683 of this titlesection 3301(a) of Pub. L. 110–246June 17, 1930
CodificationAnother section 803 of act , is classified to .June 17, 1930section 1681b of this title
Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as a note under .June 18, 2008section 3301(b) of Pub. L. 110–246section 1683 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The President shall establish and maintain an importer declaration program with respect to the importation of softwood lumber and softwood lumber products described in . The importer declaration program shall require importers of softwood lumber and softwood lumber products described in to provide the information required under subsection (b) and declare the information required by subsection (c), and require that such information accompany the entry summary documentation.section 1683b(a) of this titlesection 1683b(a) of this title

children.heading: Electronic record
children.label: 2 Electronic record
children.text: The President shall establish an electronic record that includes the importer information required under subsection (b) and the declarations required under subsection (c).
The export price for each shipment of softwood lumber or softwood lumber products.

The estimated export charge, if any, applicable to each shipment of softwood lumber or softwood lumber products as calculated by applying the percentage determined and published by the Under Secretary for International Trade of the Department of Commerce pursuant to to the export price provided in subsection (b)(1).section 1683c of this title

the person has made appropriate inquiry, including seeking appropriate documentation from the exporter and consulting the determinations published by the Under Secretary for International Trade of the Department of Commerce pursuant to ; andsection 1683c(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the export price provided pursuant to subsection (b)(1) is determined in accordance with the definition provided in ;section 1683(5) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the export price provided pursuant to subsection (b)(1) is consistent with the export price provided on the export permit, if any, granted by the country of export; and

children.label: i
children.text: in accordance with the volume, export price, and export charge rate or rates, if any, as calculated under an international agreement entered into by the country of export and the United States; and

children.label: ii
children.text: consistent with the export charge determinations published by the Under Secretary for International Trade pursuant to .section 1683c(b) of this title
